content: The surprise-based intrinsic reward signals that power curiosity-driven RL (ICM and RND) can be repurposed as a dynamic pruning gate for 2024–2025 SOTA active learning agent memory, only retaining episodic memory traces that trigger high prediction surprise rather than discarding traces based on age or static frequency thresholds.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
